title: Reactivity of organic chemicals to concentrated sulfuric acid
author: Bains, William
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A dataset of the quantitative reactivity of organic chemicals with concentrated sulfuric acid. We have collected 589 sets of kinetic data on reaction of organic chemicals with sulfuric acid from 262 literature sources, and used a Functional Group-based approach to build a model of how the Functional Groups would react in any sulfuric acid concentration from 60 % - 100 %, and between -20  o C and 100  o C. The data set provides the original reference data and kinetic measurements, parameters, intermediate computation steps, and a set of first order rate constants for the Functional Groups across the range of conditions -20 o C – 100 o C and 60% - 100% sulfuric acid.
